input.evidence_excerpt: /// Run over a set of concepts and return IDs to prune. pub fn prune_batch(&mut self, concepts: &[(String, u32, u32, usize)]) -> Vec<usize> { let mut to_prune = Vec::new(); for (idx, (label, n_inst, n_corr, n_edges)) in concepts.iter().enumerate() { let (prune, _mdl) = self.evaluate(label, *n_inst, *n_corr, *n_edges); if prune { to_prune.push(idx); } } to_prune }
